changelog: v4.2 — Lever-audit simplification + tau retune. Dropped the dead k_per_allocation_pct (Bond dynamic-k, a no-op) and retuned allocator tau 0.02→0.008 (v4.1's sweep only tested tau≥0.02, missing the better low-tau regime; the gain plateaus below 0.010, robust in both sub-period halves). Full-cycle vs v4.1: CAGR 17.52→18.16%, worst-12mo −8.6→−7.9%, Martin 3.30→3.64, MaxDD unchanged (−22.3%). cluster_cap kept. See docs/engineering/lever-audit-2026-07.md.
